rationale: Review 2's three findings identify only minor internal duplication (hb0) and two common Lean patterns (field_simp+show; prod_map rfl) whose refactoring would be stylistic preference rather than a material proof-quality gain; the shown diff already uses ring/field_simp/omega cleanly with no actual errors or brittleness that a maintainer would block on. Review 1's sound approve therefore produces an equivalent merged PR.
